code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        let sq = v * v
        if i == 0
          out = "#{sq}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{sq}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
